en: I've got to make an impression, darling. You look like an angry lizard.
ko: 인상 좀 남겨야 해, 자기야. 넌 화난 도마뱀 같아.

en: It's your best work. Very subtle. I'm gonna fly away.
Can I borrow it for Sunday church?
So this is Queen. And you must be Freddie Mercury.
ko: 자, 이게 퀸이고 넌 프레디 머큐리구나.

en: You've got a gift you all have.
So tell me, what makes Queen any different from all of the other wannabe rock stars I meet?
ko: 퀸이 다른 록스타들과 다른 점이 뭐야?

en: I'll tell you what it is.
We're four misfits who don't belong together playing to the other misfits.
ko: 우리는 어울리지 않는 네 명의 불량아들이야.

en: The outcasts, right at the back of the room, who are pretty sure they don't belong either.
We belong to them. We're a family.
ko: 우리는 가족이야. 하지만 우리 중 누구도 같지 않아.

en: But no two of us are the same. Paul.
ko: 하지만 우리 중에 같은 사람은 없어.
